title: carum carvi f. gracile
intro: Carum carvi f. gracile, also known as caraway, is a flowering plant belonging to the carrot family (Apiaceae). This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues, such as nausea, indigestion, and bloating, due to its carvone and limonene compounds. The health benefits of caraway include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory health, and aiding in weight management. Carum carvi f. gracile can be prepared in various forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, as well as being used in cooking and baking to add flavor to dishes.
